coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Too easy? Good. 0% into ride. Your ego wants intensity. Your body needs this.

coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Building the base. 7:30 at 75%. This is where champions are made.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 0% done. Your Garmin thinks you fell asleep. You're actually training. Allegedly.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 0% into ride. Smooth and steady. Build your aerobic base.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: First rep. 95% FTP. Your body is uncomfortable. Your mind is stronger. Prove it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1/8. 95-95% FTP, 85-95 rpm, Seated. Execute with precision.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/8. You're starting fresh. Show yourself what you're capable of.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: First rep. Your legs feel fresh. Check back in 8:00.
coachingNotes.MIXED: First rep: 8:00 at 95%. Smooth and controlled. Lock in form.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 2/8. 8:00 at 89%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.

coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 2/8. 89% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: 20% into session. 89%, 85-95 rpm. Focus and execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 3/8. 8:00 at 95%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.

coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Stay focused and execute the plan. 95%, 85-95 rpm. You've trained for this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 3/8. 95% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 4/8. 40% through. Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.

coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final interval! 8:00 at 89%. Then you're done. Make it count.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/8. 8:00 at 95%. This hurts because it's supposed to. Set the tone.

coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 50% complete. Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very character-rich right now.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 61% done. 2 intervals left. 22 minutes total. Don't quit now.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 7/8. 55 minutes in. Your legs are lying. You have more.

coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 71% through. This is your workout. Own it. 95% FTP.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 71% complete. Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very character-rich right now.
